title: Ground-Orbit Communications Unit
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''Ground-Orbit Communications Unit''' or '''GOCU''' was a device that allowed limited-range communications between ground forces and forces in [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]]. Developed on [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|Yuuzhan Vong invasion]], the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] was aided by the device as they could communicate with the ground during the [[Battle of Duro]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' {{1st}}
